title: Retail Shop Assistant/Sales Associate – Children’s Fashion (5-Day work |VIVOCITY)
description:
Location: VivoCity

Working Arrangement: Full-time, 5-day work week including weekends and public holidays (rostered)


Job Description:

We are hiring on behalf of a well-known international children’s clothing brand. We are looking for friendly, dependable, and customer-focused Retail Sales Associates with prior retail experience to join the team.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Deliver excellent customer service and maintain a welcoming store environment
  • Assist with product display, stock replenishment, and daily retail operations
  • Support cashiering and fitting room duties as needed
  • Collaborate with teammates and follow store guidelines and SOPs

Job Requirements:

  • Previous experience working in a retail industry or customer service is required
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills
  • Passionate about children’s fashion and retail service
  • Able to commit to a 5-day work week, including weekends and public holidays

Work Schedule:

  • 5 working days per week (retail shift-based hours)

postedCompany.description:
At GreenLane Talent Acquisition, we redefine the recruitment experience for both clients and job seekers. As a leading talent acquisition partner, we specialize in connecting top-tier professionals with leading companies. Our comprehensive approach covers everything from precise position identification to seamless onboarding, ensuring a perfect fit for both employers and candidates.


For job seekers, GreenLane is more than a recruitment agency; we are your career advocate. Our team is dedicated to understanding your unique skills, aspirations, and preferences, guiding you towards opportunities that align with your career goals. We believe in the transformative power of exceptional talent, and we are here to support you in achieving your professional ambitions.


Whether you are an employer seeking top talent or a job seeker looking for the next career move, GreenLane Talent Acquisition is your trusted partner on the journey to success.
postedCompany.name: GREENLANE PRIVATE LTD.
